name: Greg Sowell

contactInfo.office: 101 W. Main St., Suite 230, Nacogdoches, TX 75961

bio: Greg Sowell serves as the Nacogdoches County Judge, the chief executive and administrative officer of Nacogdoches County. The county judge presides over the Commissioners Court and oversees county government operations including budgeting, emergency management, and infrastructure in the Nacogdoches area.
campaignPromises: Keep Nacogdoches County taxes low while maintaining services
Support law enforcement and public safety
